steps.title: Use SOH for sine
steps.content: Sine is opposite over hypotenuse. From angle $x^\circ$, the opposite side is $63$ and the hypotenuse is $73$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Choice B uses the other leg, choice A is far too small for this triangle, and choice D is greater than $1$, which sine cannot be for an acute angle.
